zh.Grandpré, Ardennes, France: 法國德 艾斯特阿爾登斯格藍德普雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide de Grandpré於大約1215年出生在法國德 艾斯特阿爾登斯格藍德普雷時，她的父親Gauthier de Reynel37歲，母親Helisende de Trainell21歲。她於1231年8月13日與Jean de Joinville I結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1261年享年47歲。

zh-hans.Grandpré, Ardennes, France: 法国德 艾斯特阿爾登斯格藍德普雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaide de Grandpré于大约1215年出生在法国德 艾斯特阿爾登斯格藍德普雷时，她的父亲Gauthier de Reynel37岁，母亲Helisende de Trainell21岁。她于1231年8月13日与Jean de Joinville I结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1261年享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grandpré
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Pierre, Raoul.

French (Grandpré): topographic name for someone who lived near a large meadow, from French grand ‘large’ + pré ‘meadow’, or a habitational name from Grandpré or Grand Pré, names of several places in various parts of France, named with these words.

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide de Grandpré was born about 1215, in Grandpré, Ardennes, Grand Est, France, her father, Gauthier de Reynel, was 37 and her mother, Helisende de Trainell, was 21. She married Jean de Joinville I on 13 August 1231. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1261, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide de Grandpré est née environ 1215, à Grandpré, Ardennes, Grand Est, France, son père, Gauthier de Reynel, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Helisende de Trainell, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Joinville I le 13 août 1231. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1261, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide de Grandpré um 1215 in Grandpré, Ardennes, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gauthier de Reynel 37 und ihre Mutter Helisende de Trainell 21. Sie hat am 13. August 1231 Jean de Joinville I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1261 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Grandpré è nata il circa 1215 nel Grandpré, Ardennes, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Gauthier de Reynel, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Helisende de Trainell, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Joinville I il 13 agosto 1231. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1261, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Grandpré, Ardennes, France: フランスグランド エストアルデンスグランドプルe
ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Grandpréが約1215年にフランスグランド エストアルデンスグランドプルeで生まれた時，父Gauthier de Reynelは37歳，母Helisende de Trainellは21歳であった。1231年8月13日にJean de Joinville Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1261年に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Grandpré(이)가 대략 1215년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 아데네스 그랜드프e에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gauthier de Reynel(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helisende de Trainell(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1231년 8월 13일 Jean de Joinville I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1261년 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Grandpré nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Grandpré, Ardennes, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Gauthier de Reynel, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Helisende de Trainell, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Joinville I em 13 de agosto de 1231. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1261, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide de Grandpré родилась около 1215 г. в местности грандпрe, арденнесь, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Gauthier de Reynel было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Helisende de Trainell, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Joinville I 13 августа 1231 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1261 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelaide de Grandpré nació aproximadamente 1215, en Grandpré, Ardennes, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Gauthier de Reynel, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Helisende de Trainell, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jean de Joinville I el 13 de agosto de 1231. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1261, a la edad de 47 años.
